title: mentha arvensis var. varians
intro: Mentha arvensis var. varians, also known as Japanese peppermint or wild mint, is a variety of the peppermint plant that is native to Japan and parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, alleviate headaches, and reduce inflammation due to its high concentration of menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. varians include its potential to ease nausea and improve respiratory function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to create topical creams, inhalers, or added to baths for relaxation and stress relief.
